title: Human RBM3 ELISA
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"gmKpC","text":"MATERIALS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":null,"data":null},{"key":"8eVyh","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":203559,"guid":"41ABD2CD341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Human RBM3 ELISA Kit","mol_weight":0,"sku":"not available (prepared for cust","url":"http://not available","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":1,"name":"Contributed by users","link":"https://www.protocols.io","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/1.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/1.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Prepare RBM3 standards in RBM3 Dilution Buffer: 0, 31.25, 62.5, 125, 250, 500, 1000 and 2000 pg/ml.
Dilute the serum samples 1:10 with RBM3-SAMPLE-BUF.
Pipette 50μl/well RBM3-Standards (0-2000 pg/ml) and 50μl/well diluted samples in duplicates onto 96-well microplate.
Pipette 50μl/well detection conjugate – diluted RBM3-HRP conjugate onto 96-well microplate.
Shake for 5 min and incubate for 120 min at 20-25 °C.
Wash 3 times with 1:10 diluted Wash solution.
Pipette 50μl/well Tetramethylbenzidin solution and incubate for 30 min at 20-25 °C in the dark on a shaker.
Measure absorbance at 450 nm using a plate reader.
creator: Lisa-Maria Rosenthal
